creator: gmarco@giovannelli.it
text:
At 01.40 23/10/2006, you wrote:
 >Maintainer of math/abs,
 >
 >Please note that PR ports/104692 has just been submitted.
 >
 >If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
 >you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
 >and a committer will take care of it.
 >
 >The full text of the PR can be found at:
 >    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104692
 >
 >--
 >Edwin Groothuis
 >edwin@FreeBSD.org

I surely be happy to have another site to download the sources, but I 
have sent ale@freebsd.org (Alex Dupre) the patches for changing the 
site of all my ports about a week ago...

If he finally arrive to commit them <grin> he can happily add this 
site too to the abs Makefile...

I hope that this can be solved asap...
(Alex, wake up please ... :-)





Best Regards,
Gianmarco Giovannelli ,  "Unix expert since yesterday"
http://utenti.gufi.org/~gmarco/
